entry.title: how to get the filtered data from the model when using .filter()
entry.content:
Hi SAPUI5 Experts,

I have the ui.table and bind the table with model. I have the filter function and using 

                    oBinding.filter(oFilters, "Application");
to filter the table. 
The result is displayed correct on the table but I need to download the filtered data. When I try to getModel().getData(), I get the full list of items rather than with filtered data. 
 
How can I get the data that is filtered and displayed on the table in the download function.
 
Thanks for your help.
 
Kind Regards

entry.title: sap.m.radiobutton circle not visible
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I am facing one issue where in one of my project the sap.m.radio button circle is visible but in the other project it is not visible in the same workspace.

I check the manifest file also and maintain the same sap.ui library but still the circle is not visible

I tried copy paste the working xml view to non working project and the same view(where the button is visible in other project) is not working in this project.

Please have a look to the screenshots. Please suggest 

 

Thanks
Sarita

entry.title: Display customer list standard app new column addition
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement in which we need to add a new column (PAN) in the table inside Display Customer List.

I have tried to create a adaptation project on SAP BAS. I was unable to add a new column using the SAPUI5 adaptation editor. 

Fiori App reference library: "Display Customer List application"

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps(%27F2640%27)/S23OP

Any help is greatly appreciated.

Kind Regards,

Avishek

entry.title: SAPUI5: Wrong Deviation Calculation for KPI/DataPoint
entry.content:
I have an SAPUI5 application that is based on an FIORI Elements Overview Page template.
One of my cards on the OVP shows an KPI header with the following values:

  • KPI Value: Average Delivery Delay (in days) for the past 90 days
  • Target Value: Average Delivery Delay (in days) for the past 365 days
  • Automatically calculated deviation of the values  in %

We recently upgraded our system from S/4 2020 SP3 to S/4 2023 SP1. This included updating SAPUI5 libraries from 1.84.6 to 1.120.0. After the upgrade, the deviation calculation shows a wrong value. Before it worked as expected.

                
<Annotation Term="UI.DataPoint" Qualifier="DataPointDurchschnittLieferverzug">
	<Record Type="UI.DataPointType">
		<PropertyValue Property="Title" String="{@i18n>datapoint_title_durchschnitt_lieferverzug}" />
		<PropertyValue Property="Description" String="{@i18n>datapoint_title_durchschnitt_lieferverzug}" />
		<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="AvgDelivToCmtdDelivDelayInDays" />
		<PropertyValue Property="CriticalityCalculation">
			<Record Type="UI.CriticalityCalculationType">
				<PropertyValue Property="ImprovementDirection" EnumMember="UI.ImprovementDirectionType/Minimize" />
				<PropertyValue Property="ToleranceRangeHighValue" Decimal="3" />
				<PropertyValue Property="DeviationRangeHighValue" Decimal="5" />
			</Record>
		</PropertyValue>
		<PropertyValue Property="TrendCalculation">
			<Record Type="UI.TrendCalculationType">
				<PropertyValue Property="ReferenceValue" Path="AvgDlvToCmtdDlvDelayPast365Day" />
				<PropertyValue Property="UpDifference" Decimal="1" />
				<PropertyValue Property="StrongUpDifference" Decimal="2" />
				<PropertyValue Property="DownDifference" Decimal="-1" />
				<PropertyValue Property="StrongDownDifference" Decimal="-2" />
			</Record>
		</PropertyValue>
		<PropertyValue Property="ValueFormat">
			<Record Type="UI.NumberFormat">
				<PropertyValue Property="NumberOfFractionalDigits" Int="1" />
			</Record>
		</PropertyValue>
	</Record>
</Annotation>

entry.title: Building Block for Attachments not working in UI5
entry.content:
I'm trying to use the building block for file upload as described here:
https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html#/buildingBlocks/table/tableUpload

The table is succesfully displayed and loaded. However, I get the some error messages in the console:
- Error on retrieving command shortcut. Command DeleteEntry was not found!
- TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'setProperty')
at Object.updateBindingInfo (TableDelegate.ts:763:26)
at tt._rebind
- The PageReady Event was not fired within the 7000 ms timeout . It has been forced. Please contact your application developer for further analysis

Has anybody already dealt with these kind of issues, every help is appreciated.

entry.title: Async onInit - Route not trigerred
entry.content:
Hi All,

In my UI5 app, I am loading a few fragments conditionally in the onInit method using async/await and hence have declared the onInit method as async . The fragments load fine but the onRouteMatch method I try to run after await does not trigger at all. If I remove all await statements from the code , the the onRouteMatch triggers fine . 

Can someone kindly suggest what could be going wrong here .

Thanks ,

Himanshu

entry.title: oSmartFilterBar.getControlByKey(“XX”); does not work for AnalyticalParameters which defined in CDS
entry.content:
Hi All,


I am using SmartFilterBar & smartTable and created custom app , All the filters are coming using CDS annotation .
In my CDS we have two AnalyticalParameters and I have enabled considerAnalyticalParameters="true" in view-->SmartFilterBar properties.

Now in controller when I get the object of SmartFilterBar and use like below
oSmartFilterBar.getControlByKey("plant").getValue();

I am able to get the value for normal filters using the key but if I try to get value or object of AnalyticalParameters it does not work .
If I try to get object AnalyticalParameters using key it returns null.

Please guide me how I can get the object and value of AnalyticalParameters


Regards,
Piyush

entry.title: SmartFilterBar Date field default value with sign greater than or equal to
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on a SmartFilterBar with Date field and trying to populate default value with operation / option like shown in image (Greater than or equal to today's date). I tried few ways but didn't work. Can someone please help by pointing detailed way to achieve this?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Unable to load the tile Maintenance Backlog Overview(F5105)
entry.content:
Getting error as below for the app Maintenance Backlog Overview.

  1. Cannot read properties of undefined (reading "oCrossAppNavService")

entry.title: Can no longer get Service Request information via SAP-for-Me->Serv+Support->Private Cloud Workspace
entry.content:
Has anything changed since Monday 16-Dec in being able to get information on existing SERVICE REQUESTs via SAP-for-Me -> Service & Support  - using "Private Cloud Workspace".
Only I now get an error:  "No Systems Found".   I was not getting this on Monday or before that.

entry.title: Retrieve assigned IAS Groups in SAPUI5 Application (Cloud Foundry)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I’m facing an issue with retrieving user properties, specifically groups, in my SAPUI5 application, which is deployed in a Cloud Foundry environment with an on-premise ABAP backend.

I had been using the User API Service (https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/user-api-service) to fetch user information, including groups, and populating a JSON model for UI validation (e.g., showing/hiding buttons based on user roles). Until last week, this was working fine, but now I’m encountering an issue where the groups property is coming back as undefined when I debug the data.

Here's the code that I'm using to fetch the data from User Api:

 

const oUserData = this.getView().getModel("modelUser").getData();
this.setModel(new JSONModel(this.validateUserActions(oUserData.groups)), "rolModel");

 

What could be the reason for this issue, and are there any alternative methods to achieve the same functionality in my scenario (Cloud Foundry SAPUI5 Frontend / On-Premise ABAP Backend)?

If retrieving groups from IAS is not possible anymore, is there a way to fetch Role Collections directly from SAP BTP Cockpit or any other method to retrieve user role/authorization data in this setup?

I would greatly appreciate any insights or suggestions on how to resolve this issue. Thank you in advance for your time and assistance!
Looking forward to your feedback,

Cristian

entry.title: Not able to add more than one data source in sapui5 app in cloud foundry
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I have already developed and deployed a SAPUI5 freestyle application in SAP Cloud Foundry, using the SAP C4C API as the data source. Now, I need to consume some data from an on-premise S/4HANA system. However, when I add a second data source to the existing UI5 MTA application, I encounter a 404 error.

I have referred to community discussions and found that similar issues remain unresolved.

Please assist us in identifying what we are missing in adding the second data source. Attached is the project files for your reference.

Thanks

entry.title: SAPUI5: Date picker produces error "duplicate id" in mobile browsers (but not in desktop browsers)
entry.content:
Dear experts,

In our app there is an oData function import with an import parameter of type date. When the action is initiated, an input field is rendered with datepicker value help, and it opens the usual calendar and clockface dialog:

This works perfectly in the desktop browsers but on mobile devices via SAP Start there is a strange malfunction:

  • the first time the action popup is opened, date picker works normally, i.e. as in screenshots above
  • but if the user performs following sequence:
    1. picks a date
    2. then cancels the action
    3. then reopens the action again,

        the date picker dialog no longer appears. The datepicker icon is seemingly activated when touched (it briefly flickers in colour when you press), but it is unresponsive.

  • if the action is cancelled again and the page is refreshed, everything is again back to normal.

This happens on both Android and iOS.

Please suggest what could be the problem, or how to analyse further. I am currently trying to remote-debug it on Android and I will post any interesting findings.

Update: in remote debugging this comes up:

adding element with duplicate id 'ActionUtil-BLAHBLAHDIBLAH_MY_SERVICE_Entities-<My_Action_Name>-<My_Parameter_Name>-input-PC' -

Thank you, 

BR Petra

entry.title: CREATE button is not appearing after deployed Fiori Application using RAP ODATA with UI Annotation
entry.content:
Used Fiori Element template List Report Object Page

CREATE button is not appearing after deployed List Report Object Fiori Elements Application using RAP ODATA with UI Annotation

1)When I run the RAP Application locally  I am able to see the CREATE button for the Resource section and Hours Section in the Object Page.

2)When I deploy the application in SAP -on premise system 2023 and clicked on the below tile

3)Now the List Report open and clicked on particular record and  enter into the Object page and not able to see the CREATE button for the Resource and Hours section

Please find the attachments in detail

entry.title: SAP PPM table for availability of resource
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

While staffing a role in sap ppm, under the distribution over period we get auto populated values for availability.

Wanted to know from where it is being populated/ How it is being stored.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Valuation Run FAGL_FCV
entry.content: Why RXD adjustment postings use the realized gain/loss accounts instead of the 'unrealized' 'valuation' accounts that were posted in the valuation process.

entry.title: KUA funct. ‘Adapt UI’: add link poss.?
entry.content:
is it possible to use the KUA functionality ‘Adapt UI’ or a similar technique to create a constant text field on the user interface of any Fiori
in order to store the executable link to an online documentation there? Ideally, this would be in an entry on the right-hand side in the ‘Help Topics’ menu
under the ‘Learning’ entry - alternatively also on the Fiori interface in the top right-hand corner.



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Get Response from Asynchronous Outbound WebServiceggest
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am building a Fiori Application which needs to call Asynchronous WS in SAP Backend.

I have a pair of Asynchronous WebService (Inbound and Outbound). I am calling the Asynchronous Inbound WebService from UI5 and it is providing me only Status Code. The relevant Outbound WebService is configured in SAP Backend System and I can find the Response in SRT_MONI. I need the same Response in UI5 to proceed with further logic. 

Please suggest a feasible solution.

 

Thanks,

Ankit.

entry.title: SAP Fiori Element Public View add to transport request failed
entry.content:
SAP Fiori Element Public View （using Adapted UI）add to transport request failed.

How to add public view to  transport request and transport to QAS system?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Mixed languages in NWBC
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

we imported a language package for Spanish in our system. It has been available for log on using SAP GUI but when accessing using NWBC, translations are mixed between Spanish, English, and German.

This issue happens in the development system. Here are the steps we followed when installing the Spanish language. Hoping you could look over it and check if we missed anything.

1.) Since Spanish is already initially defined in the system, we set the supplementary language as English.
2) We proceeded with the importation of Language packs in the system to all clients.
3) Wait for the transport to finish successfully.
4) Check if Spanish is available for log on.

Wondering if this is caused by difference in supplementation language (EN) and secondary language (DE)? Any help is appreciated. Thank you!
